name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient vendor contract management causes missed discounts. We monitor and optimize vendor contracts instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Inefficient vendor contract management leading to missed discounts and unfavorable terms.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient vendor contract management leading to missed discounts and unfavorable terms.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient vendor contract management causes missed discounts. We monitor and optimize vendor contracts instead of manual tracking.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of vendor contracts and terms negotiation.

one_liner: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient vendor contract management causes missed discounts. We monitor and optimize vendor contracts instead of manual tracking.
